overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval town street, transitioning through a stone gate into a scenic lakeside cemetery, and approaching a large ancient tree with an open grave. The clip features warm afternoon lighting with golden sun rays and distant mountain views.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cobblestone street toward the stone archway ahead

hooded villager walking in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: tall medieval building with yellow stone walls and arched windows
two-story building with red plaster and timber framing
large stone archway marking the exit from the town
narrow street paved with uneven cobblestones

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow medieval town street flanked by stone buildings. Villagers pass by in both directions as the camera approaches a large stone archway at the end of the street. Warm afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gate transition from town to cemetery

events.description: passing through the stone archway from enclosed town street into the cemetery area

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone gate and emerging into the cemetery grounds

entered.detail: tall stone walls enclosing the cemetery grounds
tall dark green trees lining the cemetery path
weathered stone grave markers scattered along the path
distant view of a lake becoming visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone archway, transitioning from the town into a cemetery. The lighting shifts to dappled shade under the gate before opening up to reveal gravestones, cypress trees, and a distant lake view. The cobblestone path continues through the cemetery grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside cemetery with scattered gravestones and mountain views

events.description: emerging into full sunlight with expansive view of lake and snow-capped mountains

agents.ego_description: walking along the cemetery path toward a large ancient oak tree with the lake visible to the right

entered.detail: massive gnarled oak tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches
tall decorative stone pillars marking the cemetery path
snow-capped mountains visible in the far distance across the lake
large red-roofed villa with stone walls overlooking the cemetery
broken stone archway ruins among the gravestones

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide cemetery with panoramic views of the lake and distant mountains. The character walks along a dirt path lined with gravestones and stone pillars, approaching a massive ancient oak tree. A red villa sits on the hillside to the right while ruined archways appear on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient tree with open grave overlooking the lake

events.description: character stops to examine the open grave beneath the ancient oak tree
character resumes walking away from the grave site toward the lake

agents.ego_description: approaching the ancient tree, examining the open grave with a shovel beside it, then continuing to explore the lakeside cemetery

entered.detail: freshly dug open grave with a white cloth covering part of it
wooden shovel leaning against the grave mound

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the massive ancient oak tree and pauses to examine an open grave with a shovel resting beside it. After a brief inspection, the character continues walking past the tree toward the lakeshore, with gravestones scattered throughout the grass and the mountain-framed lake visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling medieval town street into a serene, expansive lakeside cemetery. It begins by following the character through a narrow cobblestone lane flanked by stone buildings and passing villagers under the long shadows of a warm afternoon sun. As the camera passes through a large stone archway, the lighting shifts into dappled shade before opening up to reveal a landscape of cypress trees, gravestones, and a distant view of a lake. The scene then expands across the cemetery grounds, moving past a red hillside villa and ruined archways toward a massive ancient oak tree. Finally, the camera pauses at an open grave with a resting shovel before continuing past the tree toward the lakeshore, framed by scattered monuments and distant mountains.
